ksa_text: Knowledge of data pipeline monitoring and observability, including data freshness tracking, volume anomaly detection, schema change detection, job failure pattern analysis, and alerting system design.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.401) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Strategy Consultant. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Strategy Consultant roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Data and AI Strategy Consultant roles increasingly include Data Architecture & Analytics competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Data and AI Strategy Consultant now include Data Architecture & Analytics competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Architecture & Analytics knowledge KSA is relevant to the Data and AI Strategy Consultant based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
